channel.title: Ai on aryamans.me
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on aryamans.me

item.title: Reviving Noize: Rebuilding a Dead React App
item.description: This post was generated by AI and reviewed, edited, and annotated by a human Some years ago, kartiknair, built a lovely little thing called Noize — a single-page app that plays looping background noise (rain, a café, a medieval town, brown noise) over pixel-art scenes, so you can relax or focus. This week I decided to actually get it running again and put it somewhere permanent. It’s now live at aryamans.

item.title: Reverse-Engineering the 8bitDo Keyboard
item.description: This post was generated by AI and reviewed, edited, and annotated by a human I have an 8BitDo Retro Mechanical Keyboard, N Edition, the cream-and-grey one that looks like an NES typewriter. It comes with “Super Buttons” that beg to be mapped to something. My something was simple: I wanted one of them to fire a single global hotkey so I could trigger Wispr Flow dictation. The catch: the only software that programs this keyboard is 8BitDo’s official Windows app, and I’m on a Mac.
